Migration guide for upgrading to MBC CQR: Migration guide for upgrading to MBC CQRS Serverless v1.3.0, including nodemailer v8 upgrade and AppSyncService.sendMessage return type change.
This guide helps you upgrade from v1.2.x: This guide helps you upgrade from v1.2.x to v1.3.0. Version 1.3.0 has no breaking changes to application logic, but includes dependency upgrades that may affect test code.
Update error handling if `NoAuth` is use: Update error handling if `NoAuth` is used
Check for `'NoAuth'` error code usage in: Check for `'NoAuth'` error code usage in your codebase
Run the full test suite after upgrading: Run the full test suite after upgrading
Breaking Change 1: nodemailer v8 Error C: Breaking Change 1: nodemailer v8 Error Code
nodemailer was upgraded from v7 to v8. T: nodemailer was upgraded from v7 to v8. The error code for authentication failure was renamed:
If no results are found, no action is re: If no results are found, no action is required.
return type changed from `Promise<any>`: return type changed from `Promise<any>` to `void | Promise<void>`. This only affects test code using `mockResolvedValue(null)`.
TypeScript will report a compilation err: TypeScript will report a compilation error in test files:
nodemailer v8 (improved TLS security, OA: nodemailer v8 (improved TLS security, OAuth2 support, SMTP command injection protection)
`AppSyncEventsService` — opt-in real-tim: `AppSyncEventsService` — opt-in real-time notification transport using the AWS AppSync Events HTTP API (set `NOTIFICATION_TRANSPORTS=appsync-event` to enable). See [Notification Module](/docs/notification-module#appsync-events-service) for setup details.
